hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: Binary search on the smaller array. Partition both arrays such that all elements on the left are ≤ all elements on the right.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: For a partition at index `i` in `nums1` and `j = (m+n+1)/2 - i` in `nums2`, the partition is valid when `nums1[i-1] <= nums2[j]` and `nums2[j-1] <= nums1[i]`.
